case_title: ON TIME LEGAL MOBILE DOCUMENT ASSISTANCE, LLC. VS. GREGORY MARTINEZ

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ON TIME LEGAL MOBILE DOCUMENT ASSISTANCE, LLC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, GREGORY DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE DUE TO INSUFFICIENT EVIDENCE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
